info.name: HireMe API
info.description: Postman collection for the HireMe API endpoints implemented so far. Current scope: the JWT auth and OTP flows under /api/auth plus CRUD endpoints for ads and projects from routes/api.php, with saved example responses for each endpoint.

variable.description: Generic bearer token for auth/logout requests.
Refresh token returned by login or refresh.
Password reset token returned by Verify OTP (Password Reset).
Bearer token from a verified company login, used by ad write endpoints.
Bearer token from a verified customer login, used by project write endpoints.

request.description: Creates an unverified customer, student, or company account and sends a signup OTP to the supplied email. Required fields are username, email, password, password_confirmation, and user_type.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Verifies a 6-character signup OTP and marks the user email as verified.
Authenticates a verified user and returns access and refresh JWTs. Copy data.access_token into the relevant collection variable for later authenticated requests.
Rotates a valid refresh token and returns a new access and refresh token pair.
Revokes all user tokens by incrementing token_version. Requires a valid access token under the api guard.
If the email exists, sends a password_reset OTP. The response stays generic whether or not the user exists.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Verifies a 6-character password_reset OTP and returns a reset_token for the password change step.
Resets the password using the reset_token returned by password_reset OTP verification. Password confirmation is required.
Returns all ads with applicants_count, company summary, since, created_at, and updated_at. No authentication is required.

request.description: Creates an ad for the authenticated company user. Required fields are job_name, req1, task1, feature1, github_required, resume_required, prev_work_required, and expected_salary_required.

body.raw:
{
  "job_name": "Backend Engineer",
  "req1": "Laravel",
  "req2": "REST APIs",
  "task1": "Build backend services",
  "task2": "Write tests",
  "feature1": "Health insurance",
  "feature2": "Remote work",
  "additional_details": "Experience with queues is a plus.",
  "github_required": true,
  "resume_required": true,
  "prev_work_required": false,
  "expected_salary_required": true
}
